items.nameZh: 潮風見習・能源資料分析師
items.positivePrompt: Original fictional Junior Energy Data Analyst for an offshore-wind strategy card game; full-body character key art, neutral confident stance, head-to-toe visible; 冷靜、精確、重視證據; carrying data terminal and policy dashboard; professional technical attire with task-appropriate PPE, institution-free insignia; navy, ivory, muted gold; Taiwan-Strait-inspired maritime environment; cinematic semi-realistic anime aesthetic with luminous atmospheric lighting, naturalistic faces, meticulous industrial detail, realistic proportions and PPE; vertical 2:3 full-bleed composition; keep face, hands and essential tools inside a 12 percent safe zone; source artwork only, designed for a separate runtime card-frame overlay; no resemblance to any real person or institution. Character direction is locked: one original fictional adult woman, cute and approachable but clearly competent and professional, with natural adult facial and body proportions, credible task-appropriate PPE and a non-sexualized presentation. The nacelle must sit correctly on one tower with a plausible offshore foundation and access platform. Keep rotors visually separated from the character and from other turbines. Prefer a few clearly readable turbines; if a rotor would be heavily occluded or cropped, omit that turbine rather than inventing partial geometry.

engineeringBackgroundPolicy: Engineering background accuracy is mandatory. Every visible offshore wind turbine must be a conventional modern three-bladed horizontal-axis wind turbine. Each complete rotor has exactly three smooth, tapered aerodynamic blades attached to one centered hub and evenly spaced 120 degrees apart. Blade curvature must remain continuous and structurally plausible, with consistent length, taper, perspective and attachment at the blade roots. The nacelle must sit correctly on one tower with a plausible offshore foundation and access platform. Keep rotors visually separated from the character and from other turbines. Prefer a few clearly readable turbines; if a rotor would be heavily occluded or cropped, omit that turbine rather than inventing partial geometry.
characterDiversityPolicy: Each new 10-character batch must read as a crew of different adult professionals, not one model in different outfits. Across every batch, use unique diversity signatures and vary casting category, age impression, face construction, skin tone, hair, body silhouette, posture, expression, camera angle, hand gesture, and tool interaction. Repeating a slot profile across batches is invalid. Do not let the shared art style override the casting lock.
